title: lithocarpus talangensis
intro: Lithocarpus talangensis, also known as Talang oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to Indonesia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus talangensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and prevent cancer due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
